pi_items.source: Task description explicitly states 'Introduction to Ceramics (Course Code: ART-205)'. Confirmed in setup_task.sh line 38 where course is created with this code. Export script line 15 queries for this code.
Task description explicitly states 'Locate Section 01'. Confirmed in setup_task.sh line 50 where section is created with short_name='01'. Export script line 15 queries for this section ID.

Task description explicitly states 'Update the Total Seats (or maximum enrollment) to exactly 12'. Verifier script line 41 retrieves this value from metadata with default value of 12, and line 50 checks if actual value equals 12.
Setup script line 42 creates control course with code 'ART-101' (Drawing 101). Export script line 20 queries for this code. Verifier uses this in line 42 to check control course was not modified.

Setup script line 53 explicitly inserts course_periods with total_seats=25 for ART-101 Section 01. Export script line 20 queries for this value. Verifier line 66 checks this value remains 25 as a safety check.
Task description line 1 explicitly states 'Username: admin'.
Task description line 1 explicitly states 'Password: Admin@123'.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires updating the enrollment capacity for ART-205 Section 01 from 25 to 12 seats in OpenSIS. The control course is ART-101 Section 01 which must remain at 25 seats. Login credentials are username 'admin' and password 'Admin@123'. Data is synthetically generated via database INSERT statements during task setup, not sourced from external data.
